label: Default
description: Canonical doc-first profile with TASK.md as the primary artifact.

templates.dispatchSummary: The target session was instructed to edit TASK.md first, then sync through:
templates.dispatchEventMessage: Dispatched to {{session.agentId}}/{{session.name}}. Dispatch summary surfaced here: load otto-system-tasks and edit {{task.taskDocPath}} first, then sync via otto tasks report|done|block|fail {{task.id}}.

label: Observed Task
description: Doc-first task profile where a sidecar observer owns durable task status synchronization.

progress.notes: Durable progress is expected to be reported by an observer rule using the tasks observer profile.

templates.dispatchSummary: The target session was instructed to execute the task and leave clear progress/blocker/done/failure signals for the observer.
templates.dispatchEventMessage: Dispatched observed task to {{session.agentId}}/{{session.name}}. Worker executes from {{task.taskDocPath}}; observer status sync is expected through an observer rule for profile observed-task.
